categories.label: Game VP
categories.description: VP tokens accumulated during the game (Books scoring, events, wars, etc.)

categories.label: Wonders
categories.description: VP from completed Wonders, including any special VP bonuses

categories.label: Buildings & Military
categories.description: VP from deployed Workers on Building and Military cards

categories.label: Resources
categories.description: 1 VP per full 10 of (Gold + Food + Stone + Books + Military Strength + Stability)
